Search O*NET Occupations

Source: R/search.R
onet_search.Rd

Searches O*NET occupations by keyword or O*NET-SOC code.

Usage

onet_search(keyword, start = 1, end = 20)

Arguments

keyword

A character string containing the search term or O*NET-SOC code.

start

Integer specifying the first result to return (default 1).

end

Integer specifying the last result to return (default 20).

Value

A tibble with columns:

code

O*NET-SOC occupation code

title

Occupation title

Examples

# Search by keyword
onet_search("software developer")
#> # A tibble: 20 × 2
#>    code       title                                            
#>    <chr>      <chr>                                            
#>  1 15-1252.00 Software Developers                              
#>  2 15-1251.00 Computer Programmers                             
#>  3 15-1253.00 Software Quality Assurance Analysts and Testers  
#>  4 15-1211.00 Computer Systems Analysts                        
#>  5 15-1299.08 Computer Systems Engineers/Architects            
#>  6 15-1255.00 Web and Digital Interface Designers              
#>  7 15-1254.00 Web Developers                                   
#>  8 15-1243.00 Database Architects                              
#>  9 15-2051.00 Data Scientists                                  
#> 10 15-1232.00 Computer User Support Specialists                
#> 11 15-1242.00 Database Administrators                          
#> 12 15-1221.00 Computer and Information Research Scientists     
#> 13 15-1244.00 Network and Computer Systems Administrators      
#> 14 15-1299.05 Information Security Engineers                   
#> 15 19-2099.01 Remote Sensing Scientists and Technologists      
#> 16 17-2072.01 Radio Frequency Identification Device Specialists
#> 17 15-1241.00 Computer Network Architects                      
#> 18 15-1299.07 Blockchain Engineers                             
#> 19 13-1151.00 Training and Development Specialists             
#> 20 17-2071.00 Electrical Engineers                             

# Search by SOC code
onet_search("15-1252")
#> # A tibble: 1 × 2
#>   code       title              
#>   <chr>      <chr>              
#> 1 15-1252.00 Software Developers
